records.rationale: Documentation annotation (`description`) — authoring/editor guidance only; it carries no testable consumer behavior.

Deprecation annotation (`deprecationMessage`) — an editor authoring hint. deacon emits no deprecation warning and applies no distinct behavior to the field, so it carries no testable consumer behavior.
Deprecation annotation (`deprecated`) — an editor authoring hint. deacon emits no deprecation warning and applies no distinct behavior to the field, so it carries no testable consumer behavior.

Legacy/deprecated feature id listed as a named key under the open `features` map purely to carry editor deprecation hints. deacon treats `features` as an open map (any feature reference is accepted) and applies no distinct behavior to these specific keys, so the property carries no separately-observable consumer behavior.
